LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon.description: This weapon is extremely large, only those massive Arachnids (larger than 2.0) can use this weapon.
LanguageData.ARA_Huge_Weapon.label: Large Weapon Trait
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_ChainReload.description: This weapon trait will increase metabolism speed with each attack, manifesting as increased firing and reloading rates.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_ChainReload.label: Chain reload
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Acid.description: This weapon's projectile hits the enemy and leaves a corrosive liquid that causes ongoing damage.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Acid.label: Acid Liquid
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_FrostExplode.descripti: This weapon arm fires a frost fog that can infect enemies. Infected enemies will explode again.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_FrostExplode.label: Frost explosion
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Icez.description: This weapon trait will freeze enemies, causing their bodies to become extremely fragile. As the effect deepens, the threshold for 'freezing' damage will significantly decrease.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Icez.label: Ice Damage
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_LightingChain.descript: This weapon trait causes a lightning chain to jump between enemies, dealing damage.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_LightingChain.label: Electricity Chain
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Spawn.description: This weapon's main attack method is to release drones, some of which will directly throw drones at the enemy, while others will track and attach to enemies for damage.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Spawn.label: Arachnid Nest
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Toxid.description: This weapon trait causes a projectile to inject toxin into the target's body when it hits.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_Damage_Toxid.label: Toxic Poison
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_OverPenetrate.description: This weapon trait causes the projectile to continue its path through all enemies, dealing damage to each one.
LanguageData.ARA_Weapon_OverPenetrate.label: Overpenetration
